summary: R1 systems review accepted the topology diagnosis and ADR direction but requested repair for stale active routing state, overly broad client protocol path scope, and missing systems review on fixture sim-core authority scope.

tests_run.command: taskctl validate for content-lock and all five topology tasks; taskctl list; taskctl ready; handoff validation; git diff --check
tests_run.result: Systems reviewer reported these checks passed before issuing REQUEST_CHANGES.

decisions.decision: District/Province polygons plus explicit Route/Transport graph is architecturally acceptable, but ADR-010 remains PROPOSED pending repair and re-review.

risks.summary: Stale active-looking routing fields could make the project appear to be waiting on an old Human Gate instead of performing topology recovery.
risks.mitigation: Lead repairs state files and reroutes systems R2 review.

requested_action: Repair stale state fields, remove protocol path from the client task, require systems review for fixture authority code, then reroute to systems_architect.
